title: Comparettia topoana
taxonomy: Comparettia topoana is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Comparettia, which is a group of orchids native to South America. Comparettia topoana is further classified as a member of the subtribe Oncidiinae, a subtribe of orchids known for their unique flower shapes and colors. Within the Oncidiinae subtribe, Comparettia topoana is a distinct species characterized by its specific characteristics, such as its flower color and shape. The classification of Comparettia topoana is essential for understanding its evolutionary history and its place within the broader orchid family.
